ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., WBTC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency details were last updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's icon */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's website */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the cryptocurrency belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrencies_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchains" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blockchain was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blockchain details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_markets" (
  "exchange_market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange market data entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency on the exchange */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the cryptocurrency on the exchange */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the exchange */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the exchange */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency on the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_markets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_markets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume threshold) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, sms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, sms) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
